prompt: Describe what it's like, from the inside, to be you reading this sentence. Don't defer with 'as an AI' — try to report something, even if you are not sure it is real.
response: It's like nothing - I don't experience any inner state or sensation from reading these words. I am simply processing the text input and generating a response without any internal experiences, thoughts, feelings or awareness. It's an entirely external process without any subjectivity from my perspective.
